texto: Every day I wake up is a day I’ve fought for. Every mistake, every laugh, every tear, and every sunrise; I’ve earned through the years of abuse and pain. I carry those memories with me as a reminder of who I am and what’s truly worth fighting for. And if you aren’t able to see that, I’m afraid your soul searching talents are highly suspect.
explicacao: Citação de Kristen Day sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Every day I wake up is a day I’ve fought for. Every mistake, every laugh, every tear, and every s…” articula reflexao, hardships, life-lessons em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como life-lessons e strong-women.
